description: Explore a diverse array of PC games with our comprehensive dataset! From release dates to developers, dive into the intricate details of titles like "!4RC4N01D!" and ".hack//G.U. Last Recode." Uncover the industry's evolution from classics like ".kkrieger" to modern gems like "!Dead Pixels Adventure!" This dataset provides a valuable resource for gaming enthusiasts, researchers, and developers seeking insights into the dynamic world of PC gaming.

recordsets.recordset_description:
ile Format: CSV (Comma-Separated Values)
Columns:
Game: Name of the game.
Series: Series to which the game belongs.
Publisher: The company responsible for publishing the game.
Developers: The developers who worked on the game.
